query: SELECT id, primaryDomain, status, overallRiskScore, totalAssets, totalFindings, engagementId, createdAt, updatedAt FROM domain_intel_scans WHERE primaryDomain LIKE '%vianova%' OR primaryDomain LIKE '%dashboard-dev%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
